product.name: Full XL Head Board
product.description: Wall-mounted Full XL headboard panel built from edge-banded MDF with laminate or wood veneer facing, sized for the Full XL mattress programs common in select-service and extended-stay properties. The sealed, moisture-resistant face stands up to daily housekeeping contact, and concealed cleat mounting keeps the panel rigid against the wall. Finish patterns are matched to your brand prototype or designer sample, and width and height can be adjusted to suit connected wallguard runs or double-bedded room layouts.
product.image: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Head Board/Full XL Head Board/Full XL Head Board.png

image.src: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Head Board/Full XL Head Board/Full XL Head Board.png
image.alt: Full XL Head Board - Full XL Head Board

product.name: King MDF Headboard Unit
product.description: King headboard unit in edge-banded MDF with an integrated laminate wallguard, engineered for hotel guestrooms where the bed wall takes constant contact from pillows, luggage, and housekeeping carts. The wallguard extends the protected surface beyond the mattress line so painted walls stay unscuffed between renovation cycles. Laminate or veneer faces are color-matched to the casegoods package, and the unit installs on concealed mounting cleats with templated dimensions for fast, repeatable room-by-room fit-out.
product.image: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Head Board/King MDF Headboard Unit/DMD Stratus.jpg

image.src: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Head Board/King MDF Headboard Unit/DMD Driftmark.jpg
/Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Head Board/King MDF Headboard Unit/DMD Stratus.jpg
/Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Head Board/King MDF Headboard Unit/DMD Seabrook.jpg
/Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Head Board/King MDF Headboard Unit/DMD Shoreline.jpg
/Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Head Board/King MDF Headboard Unit/DMD Tidefall.jpg

product.name: King Upholstered Headboard Unit
product.description: Upholstered king headboard with integrated wallguard, combining a padded face in fabric, polyurethane, or leather over commercial-grade foam with accent panels that protect the surrounding wall. Built on an engineered-wood frame sized for standard hotel king mattress programs, it delivers the soft, residential look guests expect in full-service and boutique properties while holding up to commercial cleaning. Upholstery is specified from contract-rated fabrics, and stitch patterns, panel divisions, and accent finishes follow your designer scheme.

product.name: Queen Head Board
product.description: Queen headboard panel for hotel guestrooms, available as a clean laminate or veneer face or with an upholstered insert over commercial-grade foam. Built on an edge-banded MDF core that resists chipping and moisture at the edges where headboards fail first, it mounts on concealed wall cleats for a rigid, rattle-free installation. Widths follow standard queen mattress programs and can be extended for double-queen rooms, with finishes matched to the nightstands and casegoods in the same package.

product.name: Double Drawer Night Stand
product.description: Two-drawer guestroom nightstand offering enclosed bedside storage for properties that favor a cleaner presentation. Both drawers run on full-extension, soft-close commercial slides, and the laminate or veneer carcass uses edge-banded, moisture-sealed construction that withstands nightly cleaning. Sized to standard hotel bed-wall dimensions and finished to match the room casegoods program, with hardware drawn from contract-rated lines. Designers can specify two-tone finishes, integrated power, or custom pulls to suit the brand standard.
product.image: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Night Stand/Double Drawer Night Stand/Double Drawer Night Stand.png

image.src: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Night Stand/Double Drawer Night Stand/Double Drawer Night Stand.png
image.alt: Double Drawer Night Stand - Double Drawer Night Stand

spec.name: Finish
spec.value: Laminate/Veneer; Matte lacquer; Brushed metal hardware

product.name: Open Shelf Night Stand
product.description: Open-shelf nightstand built for hotels that want bedside storage guests can see and housekeeping can clean in seconds. The drawerless design removes the most common service failure point in guestroom casegoods, leaving a sealed laminate or veneer shell with an edge-banded shelf rated for daily use. A favored choice for select-service and extended-stay programs prioritizing durability and quick room turns, it matches DMD headboards and bed frames for a coordinated guestroom package.
product.image: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Night Stand/Open Shelf Night Stand/Open Shelf Night Stand.png

image.src: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Night Stand/Open Shelf Night Stand/Open Shelf Night Stand.png

image.src: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Night Stand/Open Shelf Night Stand/Open Shelf Floating Night Stand.png
image.alt: Open Shelf Night Stand - Open Shelf Night Stand

spec.name: Finish
spec.value: Laminate/Veneer; Matte lacquer; Brushed metal hardware

product.name: Single Drawer Night Stand
product.description: Guestroom nightstand with a single soft-close drawer and an open lower shelf, built on an edge-banded MDF or plywood carcass faced in laminate or veneer. The drawer runs on full-extension commercial slides rated for years of nightly use, and the open shelf keeps guest items visible at checkout. Compact dimensions suit standard bed-wall layouts, with finishes and brushed-metal hardware matched to the headboard and casegoods package, and tops available in scratch-resistant HPL.

spec.name: Finish
spec.value: Laminate/Veneer; Matte lacquer; Brushed metal hardware

product.name: Full XL Bed Frame - Metal
product.description: Full XL steel platform frame sized for the mattress programs used in extended-stay, dormitory, and double-bedded hotel rooms. Welded construction with a powder-coated finish handles institutional use, and the platform supports the mattress directly with no box spring. Three platform heights cover low-profile looks, standard housekeeping clearance, and under-bed luggage storage. A practical workhorse for properties standardizing on Full XL across large room counts, shipped knock-down for efficient freight.
product.image: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Bed Frame/Full XL Bed Frame - Metal/Bed Base Model 2.png

image.src: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Bed Frame/Full XL Bed Frame - Metal/Bed Base Model 2.png
image.alt: Full XL Bed Frame - Metal - Bed Base Model 2

image.src: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Bed Frame/Full XL Bed Frame - Metal/Bed Base Model 3.png
image.alt: Full XL Bed Frame - Metal - Bed Base Model 3

product.name: King Bed Frame - Metal
product.description: Welded steel platform bed frame for hotel king mattress programs, engineered to carry commercial loads night after night without squeaks or racking. The powder-coated frame is offered in three platform heights to suit low-profile designs, standard housekeeping clearance, or under-bed luggage storage, and it supports the mattress directly with no box spring required. Powder-coat color is specified to your standard, and frames ship knock-down for efficient freight and fast room-by-room assembly.
product.image: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Bed Frame/King Bed Frame - Metal/Bed Base Model 3.png

image.src: /Images/Hotel/Guest Room/Bed Frame/King Bed Frame - Metal/Bed Base Model 3.png
image.alt: King Bed Frame - Metal - Bed Base Model 3

image.alt: King Bed Frame - Metal - Bed Base Model 2

spec.name: Finish
spec.value: Powder coating color - to Your Specifications

product.name: King Bed Frame - MDF
product.description: King platform bed frame in edge-banded MDF panel construction, finished in laminate or veneer to match the guestroom casegoods package. Panel sides conceal the under-bed zone for a clean, built-in look that designers favor in renovated rooms, while the engineered core carries commercial loads without flexing. Offered in multiple platform heights, with matte or gloss finish options and color-matching to your approved sample. Pairs with DMD headboard units and nightstands for a coordinated bed wall.

product.name: Queen Bed Frame - Metal
product.description: Queen-size welded steel bed frame built for the nightly duty cycle of hotel and multi-family use. The platform design eliminates the box spring, holding the mattress on a rigid powder-coated frame offered in three heights for housekeeping clearance or under-bed storage. Steel construction shrugs off the vacuum and luggage impacts that loosen residential frames, and the powder-coat finish is color-matched to your specification. Ships knock-down with hardware packed per room for phased installations.

product.name: Queen Bed Frame - MDF
product.description: Queen platform bed frame built from edge-banded MDF with laminate or veneer faces, designed to read as architectural millwork rather than exposed hardware. The panel construction hides the under-bed cavity, resists moisture at the sealed edges, and carries commercial mattress loads without a box spring. Multiple platform heights accommodate housekeeping or storage requirements, and finishes are color-matched to the room casegoods so the bed wall installs as one coordinated composition.

product.name: TV Media Panel 1
product.description: Wall-mounted guestroom TV media panel faced in two-tone HPL, providing a finished backdrop for the television while routing cabling out of sight. The slim panel uses a plywood or MDF core with moisture-sealed, edge-banded perimeters, and mounts flush to the wall for housekeeping-friendly cleaning with no console required beneath. Two-color laminate layouts let designers carry an accent finish across the room, and widths scale from compact double-queen walls to full king elevations.

subcategory.description: Guest room Amenity Tower for hospitality environments

product.name: Amenity Tower
product.description: Vertical guestroom amenity tower combining open and closed storage for minibar, coffee station, luggage, and hanging space in one compact footprint. Built on a plywood or MDF carcass with an HPL working surface and edge-banded, moisture-sealed construction throughout, it consolidates functions that previously needed a dresser, closet, and console. A staple of modern select-service prototypes where guestroom square footage is tight, with heights, compartments, and finishes configured to your room design.

product.name: Luggage Bench
product.description: Guestroom luggage bench with a scratch-resistant HPL top that takes the daily impact of suitcases without showing wear. Built on a plywood or MDF base with moisture-sealed, edge-banded construction, it replaces folding luggage racks with a fixed piece that reads as furniture and survives like equipment. Bench height and width follow standard guestroom layouts, and the laminate finish is matched to the desk and casegoods so the room installs as one coordinated package.

subcategory.name: Bar Stools
subcategory.image: /Images/Restaurant/Dining Area/Bar Stools/High Bar Stool/high bar stool.png

product.name: High Bar Stool
product.description: Bar-height stool built for the hardest duty cycle in restaurant seating: constant mounting, dismounting, dragging, and footrest wear. Frames are welded steel or reinforced hardwood with a wear-plated footrest at the contact point where finishes fail first, and seats are specified in wood, polypropylene, or upholstered contract vinyl to match the front-of-house scheme. Sized for standard bar-height counters, with seat heights confirmed against your bar elevation before production so guests sit comfortably.
product.image: /Images/Restaurant/Dining Area/Bar Stools/High Bar Stool/high bar stool.png

image.src: /Images/Restaurant/Dining Area/Bar Stools/High Bar Stool/high bar stool.png

product.name: Corner Booth
product.description: L-shaped corner booth that converts dead corner square footage into high-demand seating. Built on a kiln-dried hardwood frame with reinforced corner construction, commercial-grade foam, and upholstery rated for public assembly, it follows your floor plan dimensions rather than forcing the plan around stock sizes. Corner units anchor dining room layouts in restaurants, cafés, and hotel dining outlets, and DMD fabricates them from measured drawings to the seat height and depth standards your operator specifies.

product.name: Double Booth
product.description: Double-sided restaurant booth serving two tables from one shared back, the most space-efficient seating format in commercial dining. The kiln-dried hardwood frame is engineered for slide-in use from both sides, with commercial high-density foam and public-assembly-rated upholstery that survives grease, wine, and daily sanitizing. Back height options balance privacy against sightlines, and dimensions are coordinated with the floor plan so aisle clearances and table reach work for servers and guests alike.

product.name: Single Booth
product.description: Single-sided restaurant booth built on a kiln-dried hardwood frame with commercial-grade high-density foam and upholstery rated for public assembly use. Designed to run along walls and partitions where it maximizes covers per square foot, the booth takes spilled food, daily sanitizing, and constant slide-in seating without breaking down. Seat height, depth, and back angle are specified with the operator to suit the service style, and vinyl or polyurethane upholstery handles bleach-based cleaning protocols.

product.name: Plastic Chair
product.description: Plastic Chair product for Dining Chairs

product.name: Restaurant Upholstered Chair
product.description: Fully upholstered dining chair for restaurants and cafés. Fabric or vinyl seat and back over a reinforced hardwood frame. Commercial-grade foam available.
product.image: /Images/Restaurant/Dining Area/Dining Chairs/Upholstered Chair/Soft blush_peac Upholstered Accent Chair 360 return.jpg

image.src: /Images/Restaurant/Dining Area/Dining Chairs/Upholstered Chair/Soft blush_peac Upholstered Accent Chair 360 return.jpg
image.alt: Upholstered Chair - Soft blush_peac Upholstered Accent Chair 360 return

image.alt: Upholstered Chair - Soft Yellow Upholstered Accent Chair 4

image.alt: Upholstered Chair - Warm Gray and taupes Upholstered Accent Chair 360 return 6

image.src: /Images/Restaurant/Dining Area/Dining Chairs/Upholstered Chair/Warm terracott Upholstered Accent Chair 360 return 1.jpg
image.alt: Upholstered Chair - Warm terracott Upholstered Accent Chair 360 return 1

product.name: Wooden Chair
product.description: Solid wood restaurant dining chair built with reinforced commercial joinery, using corner blocks and glued mortise joints rather than the stapled connections that fail in daily service. The hardwood frame takes continuous turnover, dragging, and stacking abuse while keeping the warm, classic look operators want in full-service dining rooms. Stain colors are matched to your interior scheme, and an upholstered seat pad in contract-grade vinyl or fabric can be added for comfort-led concepts.
